description:
All public methods accepting part indices (u8) in device.rs, wasm/lib.rs, and
integra.ts lack bounds checking. A part >= 16 causes array-index panics.

Affected locations:
- crates/integral-core/src/device.rs: set_part_level(), set_part_pan(), set_part_mute(), etc. (lines 201-246)
- crates/integral-wasm/src/lib.rs: direct array indexing at lines 1076, 1092, 1132, 1288

Fix: Create a PartIndex newtype in integral-core that validates 0..16 at
construction. Propagate through WASM bindings and return JsError for invalid
indices instead of panicking.
title: Add PartIndex newtype with bounds validation
